meaning_en: To take care of, to be considerate
To be merry, to be cheerful
To devote oneself to, to focus on
To hold a grudge, to resent
To be inferior, to fall behind
To worry too much, to brood over
To break the ice, to begin talking
To be particular about, to fuss over
To be finished, to be completed
To yearn for, to long for
To become obsolete, to go out of fashion
To engage in, to participate in
To be bewildered, to be perplexed
To crack down on, to control
To embark on, to set out
To be enthusiastic, to be eager
To come loose, to be untied
To be diverted, to disappear into
To lose sight of, to miss
To hold (an event), to feel (a sensation)
To feel at ease, to relax
